In 2010 to 2016 Honda CR-Zs the exterior door handles will fail without any symptoms. Leaving the driver unable to unlatch the door without being inside. The problem has not been addressed by Honda, but many owners have reported it being a common problem. The door handle latch te

narrative.headline: What 2015 Honda Cr-Z owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 5 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
